candidate_discovery.command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select lower(coalesce(projects.project_name, projects.name, records.display_name,'')) as name_key, count(*) as n, group_concat(records.record_id, ' | ') as ids from records join projects on records.record_id=projects.record_id where records.record_kind='project' and lower(coalesce(projects.project_name, projects.name, records.display_name,'')) in ('2025-2029 capital plan','cops, cameras, care','open stroller pilot') group by lower(coalesce(projects.project_name, projects.name, records.display_name,'')) order by name_key;"
candidate_discovery.result_summary: Selected exact-name project clusters: 2025-2029 Capital Plan has 5 records, Cops, Cameras, Care has 3 records, and Open Stroller Pilot has 3 records. The selected aliases are all source-specific/status-slice records into the broader same-name targets.

record_existence_and_kind.command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select r.record_id, r.record_kind, r.display_name, p.project_name, p.project_type, p.project_family, p.status, p.document_time_status, r.primary_source_id, (select count(*) from record_sources rs where rs.record_id=r.record_id) as source_count from records r join projects p on r.record_id=p.record_id where r.record_id in ('project_174396-2025-2029-capital-plan','project_meeting-doc-152171-2025-2029-capital-plan','project_meeting-doc-154976-2025-2029-capital-plan','project_meeting-doc-177271-capital-plan-2025-2029','project_cops-cameras-care-nov2022','project_meeting-doc-115246-cops-cameras-care','project_open-stroller-pilot-nov2022','project_open-stroller-pilot-sep2022','project_2025-2029-capital-plan','project_cops-cameras-care-initiative','project_open-stroller-pilot') order by r.record_id;"
record_existence_and_kind.result_summary: 11/11 selected alias and target records exist as record_kind=project. Within each merge group, project_name matches exactly; project_type/project_family align where populated. Status differences are source-time lifecycle/status slices.

do_not_merge_conflicts.db_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with pairs(alias,target) as (values ('project_174396-2025-2029-capital-plan','project_2025-2029-capital-plan'),('project_meeting-doc-152171-2025-2029-capital-plan','project_2025-2029-capital-plan'),('project_meeting-doc-154976-2025-2029-capital-plan','project_2025-2029-capital-plan'),('project_meeting-doc-177271-capital-plan-2025-2029','project_2025-2029-capital-plan'),('project_cops-cameras-care-nov2022','project_cops-cameras-care-initiative'),('project_meeting-doc-115246-cops-cameras-care','project_cops-cameras-care-initiative'),('project_open-stroller-pilot-nov2022','project_open-stroller-pilot'),('project_open-stroller-pilot-sep2022','project_open-stroller-pilot')) select d.* from do_not_merge d join pairs p on d.kind='project' and ((d.record_id_a=p.alias and d.record_id_b=p.target) or (d.record_id_a=p.target and d.record_id_b=p.alias));"
do_not_merge_conflicts.db_result: no output; no selected pair is present in canonical do_not_merge
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_command: jq -r '.pairs.project[]? | select((.record_ids | index("project_174396-2025-2029-capital-plan") and index("project_2025-2029-capital-plan")) or (.record_ids | index("project_meeting-doc-152171-2025-2029-capital-plan") and index("project_2025-2029-capital-plan")) or (.record_ids | index("project_meeting-doc-154976-2025-2029-capital-plan") and index("project_2025-2029-capital-plan")) or (.record_ids | index("project_meeting-doc-177271-capital-plan-2025-2029") and index("project_2025-2029-capital-plan")) or (.record_ids | index("project_cops-cameras-care-nov2022") and index("project_cops-cameras-care-initiative")) or (.record_ids | index("project_meeting-doc-115246-cops-cameras-care") and index("project_cops-cameras-care-initiative")) or (.record_ids | index("project_open-stroller-pilot-nov2022") and index("project_open-stroller-pilot")) or (.record_ids | index("project_open-stroller-pilot-sep2022") and index("project_open-stroller-pilot"))) | .record_ids | @tsv' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_result: no output; no selected pair is present in data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json

prior_prep_conflicts_through_identity108.command: for f in data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch0*-prep.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch10[0-8]-prep.json; do jq -r --arg f "$f" '.proposed_aliases[]? | select(.kind=="project") | select(.alias_id as $a | ["project_174396-2025-2029-capital-plan","project_meeting-doc-152171-2025-2029-capital-plan","project_meeting-doc-154976-2025-2029-capital-plan","project_meeting-doc-177271-capital-plan-2025-2029","project_cops-cameras-care-nov2022","project_meeting-doc-115246-cops-cameras-care","project_open-stroller-pilot-nov2022","project_open-stroller-pilot-sep2022"] | index($a)) | [$f,.alias_id,.target_id] | @tsv' "$f" 2>/dev/null; done
prior_prep_conflicts_through_identity108.result: no output; none of the proposed project aliases appear in prior codex identity prep artifacts through batch108

source_evidence_spot_check.command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with refs(source_id,block_id) as (values ('meeting_doc_151861','p005_c0015'),('meeting_doc_174391','p011_c0006'),('meeting_doc_174396','p001_c0002'),('meeting_doc_152171','p002_c0002'),('meeting_doc_154976','p024_c0003'),('meeting_doc_177271','p015_c0002'),('meeting_doc_105921','p027_c0008'),('meeting_doc_100341','p025_c0008'),('meeting_doc_115246','p003_c0007'),('meeting_doc_104791','p018_c0010'),('meeting_doc_100341','p007_c0004'),('meeting_doc_95176','p018_c0006')) select b.source_id, b.block_id, substr(replace(replace(b.raw_text, char(10), ' '), char(13), ' '), 1, 220) as text from blocks_fts b join refs r on b.source_id=r.source_id and b.block_id=r.block_id order by b.source_id, b.block_id;"
source_evidence_spot_check.result_summary: Block evidence directly names or describes the three selected project identities: 2025-2029 Capital Plan, Cops, Cameras, Care, and Open Stroller Pilot.

forbidden_command_compliance.result: No external/provider-backed commands or profiles/providers were used. No canonicalize, canonicalize-wave, canonicalize-review, campaign dedup, identity-review-run, write, ask, schema-propose, ontology-normalize-run, materialize, export-jsonl, or validate commands were run. Inspection used local deterministic commands only: pwd, rg, sed, ls, sqlite3, jq, head, date, git status, and test; the only write was this prep artifact.
